name: Auth Profile - Unauthorized Access
details: Successfully rejected request without auth cookies/token (Status 401).

name: Login - Missing Password Payload
details: Rejected login missing password successfully (Status 400: "Missing credentials").

name: OTP Request - Missing Email Field
details: Rejected OTP request without email field successfully (Status 400).

name: OTP Request - Invalid Email Format
details: Correctly validated email format check (Status 500: "connect ENETUNREACH 2607:f8b0:400e:c09::6c:465 - Local (:::0)").

name: OTP Verify - Invalid OTP Code Rejection
details: Verification failed successfully with incorrect code (Status 400: "Invalid or expired verification code").

name: Register - Incomplete Payload Validation
details: Successfully blocked registration request missing name/password keys (Status 400).

name: Progress Calculation - Access Control
details: Successfully rejected unauthorized progress calculation requests (Status 401).
